name: @onda/wasm-audio
description: ONDA audio analysis (decode + FFT spectrum) compiled to WebAssembly — drives audio-reactive visuals in the browser, identical to the native export.

scripts.build: cargo build -p onda-wasm-audio --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/onda_wasm_audio.wasm --out-dir pkg --target web
